title: E-commerce Sales Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Sales Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="400" height="300">
<g transform="translate(200,150) scale(0.5)">
<rect x="-20" y="-30" width="100" height="60" fill="#B7D7CD" rx="10"/>
<rect x="-10" y="-20" width="80" height="40" fill="#C06C88" rx="10"/>
<rect x="10" y="-10" width="60" height="20" fill="#411C56" rx="10"/>
<rect x="20" y="0" width="40" height="10" fill="#B7D7CD" rx="10"/>
<rect x="30" y="10" width="20" height="5" fill="#C06C88" rx="10"/>
<text x="-15" y="5" fill="#000" font-size="12"
transform="rotate(-45 0, 0)">Sales Dashboard</text>
<text x="-5" y="-5" fill="#000" font-size="10">Filter by Region</text>
<text x="5" y="5" fill="#000" font-size="10">Filter by Product</text>
<text x="15" y="-5" fill="#000" font-size="10">Sales Metrics</text>
<path d="M 0,0 L 10,0 L 10,10 L 0,10 Z" fill="#B7D7CD"/>
<path d="M 0,10 L -10,10 L -10,20 L 0,20 Z" fill="#C06C88"/>
<circle cx="-2" cy="-2" r="2" fill="#411C56"/>
<circle cx="2" cy="-2" r="2" fill="#B7D7CD"/>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: The dashboard should be fully interactive with state updates for filter options and sales metrics.
Use only the specified colors in the palette.
Implement responsive design to ensure the dashboard remains centered and symmetric at different screen sizes.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Sales Dashboard

starterCode.react:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; const App = () => { const [region, setRegion] = useState(''); const [product, setProduct] = useState(''); const [sales, setSales] = useState({}); const handleRegionChange = (e) => { setRegion(e.target.value); }; const handleProductChange = (e) => { setProduct(e.target.value); }; return (

Sales Dashboard

Sales Metrics

Total Sales:

${sales.total}

Average Order Value:

${sales.average}

Top Selling Products:

  • Product 1
  • Product 2
  • Product 3

Top Selling Regions:

  • Region 1
  • Region 2
  • Region 3
); }; export default App;

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filter options, and sales metrics.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
